reference_answer: Field collector Niko Shah received sample B-12.
WS-12's initial status was pending lab receipt.
B-12 was assigned to nitrate testing.
The first test was denied as valid because the vial seal was loose.
The sample condition was corrected from loose seal to intact seal.
It was withdrawn because the approved result was below threshold.
The approved-result entry superseded the older pending-lab-receipt note.
The current docket status is completed below threshold.
